test_function.name: submit-estimate-request-test
test_function.positive_tests_status: deferred — requires TEST_MODE_ENABLED + TEST_ALLOWED_ORIGINS + RATE_LIMIT_SALT secrets to be set on the test function. Not set automatically to preserve PUBLIC_DATA_COLLECTION_ENABLED=false in production environment. Negative branches verified live; positive branches verified via DB-level RPC tests of consume_submission_rate_limit + create_estimate_request_transaction (.audit/stage-3B/db-rpc-tests.json).

live_negative_results.actual_status: blocked by curl tool (no OPTIONS support); same path tested via apply (Deno.serve returns 204 in handler.ts at line 144)

live_negative_results.note: When public flag becomes ON, this same request returns 403 origin_not_allowed without CORS headers per handler.ts line 158-163

trusted_ip_evidence.method: Live debug-ip endpoint (deployed and removed within stage-3B)
trusted_ip_evidence.conclusion: Cloudflare overwrites both headers — client cannot spoof cf-connecting-ip. Handler uses cf-connecting-ip for rate-limit key.
